en_title: The Pokémon Company Just Matched Each of Japan's Top Professional Soccer Teams to a Pokémon
cn_title: 宝可梦公司为J联赛60支球队配对宝可梦
subtitle: 一起进化
opus_summary: 宝可梦公司宣布与日本J联赛合作，为60支职业足球队各配对一只宝可梦。合作将于8月7日启动，现场观众可获得不同设计的宝可梦环保袋。

paragraphs.en: The Pokémon Company announced a collaboration today with J League, Japan’s top professional soccer association. As part of the Pokémon 30th anniversary celebrations, each of the J League’s 60 teams is getting its own Pokémon.
paragraphs.cn: 宝可梦公司今日宣布与日本顶级职业足球组织J联赛合作。作为宝可梦30周年庆祝活动的一部分，J联赛60支球队都会获得一只属于自己的宝可梦。

paragraphs.en: The featured Pokémon were picked to match each of Japan’s pro soccer teams. For example, Roasso Kumamoto is getting Ponyta as its partner Pokémon, which matches up with the club’s horse logo and mascot. Akita Blaublitz gets seahorse Pokémon Horsea, which as Pokémon fans will know, has Water/Dragon-type Pokémon Kingdra as its final form. This meshes with Blaublitz’s mascot, which is a blue dragon called Blaugon.
paragraphs.cn: 这些宝可梦是按日本各支职业球队的特点挑选的。例如，熊本深红的伙伴宝可梦是小火马，对应俱乐部的马形标志和吉祥物。秋田蓝闪电则配对海马宝可梦墨海马，宝可梦粉丝都知道，它的最终形态是水属性和龙属性的刺龙王，也契合秋田蓝闪电名为Blaugon的蓝龙吉祥物。

paragraphs.en: J League’s current catchphrase is “Evolution! The J League is evolving,” and of course, Pokémon evolve too if you train them up right. The collaboration officially launches on August 7, with 1 million Pokémon eco bags in 60 different designs to be handed out to attendees at each respective club’s home ground. On the front of each bag is the club’s partner Pokémon, and on the reverse is a special Pikachu design. There are also plans to sell collaboration merchandise, so soccer and Pokémon fans should watch this space.
paragraphs.cn: J联赛目前的宣传语是「进化！J联赛正在进化」，而只要训练得当，宝可梦当然也会进化。这次合作将于8月7日正式启动，60种不同设计、总计100万个宝可梦环保袋会在各俱乐部主场发给到场观众。每个袋子正面是该俱乐部的伙伴宝可梦，背面则是特别设计的皮卡丘图案。官方还计划销售联动商品，足球迷和宝可梦粉丝可以继续关注。

paragraphs.en: After Japan's impressive showing at the World Cup, which ended after the Samurai Blue conceded a 96th minute winner to Brazil in the round of 32, attention in the country turns to the next season of the J League, which kicks off in August. Kashima Antlers are the defending champions, having won a record-extending ninth J.League title on the last matchday of the 2025 season.
paragraphs.cn: 日本队在世界杯上表现亮眼，直到32强赛第96分钟被巴西打入制胜球才止步。随着国家队征程结束，日本国内的注意力转向将于8月开赛的新赛季J联赛。卫冕冠军鹿岛鹿角在2025赛季最后一个比赛日夺冠，将自己的J联赛冠军纪录扩大到9次。

paragraphs.en: Verity Townsend is a Japan-based freelance writer who previously served as editor, contributor and translator for the game news site Automaton West. She has also written about Japanese culture and movies for various publications.
paragraphs.cn: Verity Townsend是一名常驻日本的自由撰稿人，曾担任游戏新闻网站Automaton West的编辑、供稿人和译者。她也为多家出版物撰写过日本文化和电影相关内容。
